name: Class Informer
author: Port of IDA Class Informer by Sirmabus / kweatherman
description: Scans MSVC-compiled binaries for C++ RTTI data, identifies virtual function tables, reconstructs class hierarchies, and annotates the binary. Port of the IDA Pro Class Informer plugin.
longdescription: Class Informer scans MSVC-compiled binaries for C++ Run-Time Type Identification (RTTI) data. It locates CompleteObjectLocators (COL), TypeDescriptors, ClassHierarchyDescriptors, and virtual function tables (vftables). Found structures are annotated with names and comments, and a results pane lists all discovered classes with their inheritance hierarchy.

installinstructions.default: Copy the binja_class_informer folder to your Binary Ninja user plugins directory.
